problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: If Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
